info.title: Incrementalist.Cmd
info.description:
Copyright © 2015-2025 Petabridge
run                      Run a command against affected projects. Use the
`--dry` option to test without executing.
list-affected-folders    List affected folders instead of .NET projects.
create-config            Create a new configuration file with current options.
run-process              Run a custom process against affected projects.
Allows specifying the process to start and its
arguments. Useful for non-dotnet commands or scripts.
help                     Display more information on a specific command.
version                  Display version information.

options.name: --sln
options.description:
The name of the Solution file to be analyzed by
Incrementalist. Defaults to '*.sln' in the
current directory.

options.name: --file
options.description:
If specified, writes the output to the named
file.

options.name: --branch
options.description:
The git branch to compare against, i.e. 'dev'
or 'master'.

options.name: --dir
options.description:
Specify the working directory explicitly.
Defaults to using the current working
directory.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Prints out extensive debug
logs during operation.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
(Default: 2) Specifies the load timeout for the
solution in whole minutes. Defaults to 2
minutes.

options.name: --config
options.description:
Path to the configuration file. Defaults to
.incrementalist/incrementalist.json in the
current directory.

options.name: --continue-on-error
options.description:
(Default: true) When running commands, continue
executing even if some commands fail.

options.name: --parallel
options.description:
(Default: false) When running commands, execute
them in parallel.

options.name: --parallel-limit
options.description:
(Default: 0) When running commands, the number
of parallel projects to run.

options.name: --fail-on-no-projects
options.description:
(Default: false) When running commands, fail if
no projects are affected.

options.name: --skip-glob
options.description:
Glob pattern to exclude projects from the final
list. Applied after analyzing dependencies.

options.name: --target-glob
options.description:
Glob pattern to include only matching projects
in the final list. Applied after analyzing
dependencies.

options.name: --name-application-to-start
options.description:
(Default: dotnet) The application or document
to start the process.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --dry

Performs a dry run without executing any
commands. Useful for testing.

options.name: --engine
options.description:
(Default: StaticGraph) The engine used to
analyze the solutions and projects. Either
StaticGraph or Workspace
